hero.title: Towel Day: Don't Panic
hero.reason: In honor of Towel Day, a holiday observed by fans of Douglas Adams' science fiction series 'The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy', this film is a comedic take on the series.
hero.blurb: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy is an entertaining film that stays true to the quirky spirit of Douglas Adams' book. With its witty humor and out-of-this-world adventure, it's a must-see for fans of science fiction and comedy alike.

released.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: At World's End
released.reason: Released today in 2007, this swashbuckling adventure cemented the Pirates franchise as a global phenomenon and showcased Johnny Depp's iconic Captain Jack Sparrow.
released.blurb: Pirates of the Caribbean: At World's End is a thrilling ride filled with action, adventure, and memorable characters. With its stunning visuals and epic battles, it's a must-see for fans of the franchise.

birthday.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Ian McShane, starring alongside Jennifer Love Hewitt and Freddie Prinze Jr. in this classic horror film that has become a staple of the genre.
birthday.blurb: I Know What You Did Last Summer is a suspenseful horror film with a talented young cast and plenty of shocking twists. Ian McShane's performance adds depth to the story, making it a compelling watch.

awful.title: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever
awful.reason: this infamous action film is often cited as one of the worst movies ever made, with a convoluted plot and cringe-worthy acting.
awful.blurb: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever is an unintentionally hilarious film that fails on almost every level. With its nonsensical plot and atrocious acting, it's a must-see for fans of so-bad-it's-good cinema.
